name: Bethany Chen

current_profile.summary: High school STEM teacher (8 years) with a Master's in Education. Designs curriculum, runs workshops, and integrates digital tools (LMS, simulations). Uses AI tutoring apps and has experimented with GenAI for lesson drafts and differentiation ideas. No coding background.
current_profile.ai_experience: Uses AI tutoring apps and GenAI for lesson drafts

learning_intent: Wants to design AI-enhanced learning experiences at scale. Motivated by personalization potential and equity improvements. Goal: become an AI-literate instructional designer who can collaborate with product and engineering to build responsible AI learning tools.

target_jd.title: AI Learning Experience Designer / Instructional Designer (AI)
requirements: Design AI-enhanced learning journeys, lesson plans, and assessments
Prototype prompts and content templates for AI tutors/assistants
Use learning analytics to iterate on content and personalization strategies
Ensure responsible AI use: student privacy, bias mitigation, transparency

expected_skill_gaps.description: Understand LLM basics, limitations, and multimodal capabilities relevant to education. Privacy/IP/bias fundamentals with a student-safety lens.
Prompt patterns for tutoring/coaching; rubrics as prompts; iteration loops.
Define quality metrics for tutoring output; create small golden sets for lesson outcomes.
Learning design with AI; integrating AI into pedagogy and classroom workflows.
Explain AI behaviors to educators and parents; write clear AI usage guidelines.
